name: exploratory
description: Exploratory prototype: time-boxed, no production wiring, must end with a plan or be discarded.

rules.guidance: Prototypes are explicitly time-boxed (1-3 days typical). The box end date must be stated upfront. If the goal is not reached in time, the prototype is discarded, not extended.
Prototype code must not be wired into production paths (no feature flags pointing to prototype, no production DB connections). Prototype lives in a separate branch or directory.
At the end of the time box, the outcome is either: a formal plan to productionize the approach, or deletion of the prototype. Prototypes must not linger in main branches.
Record key findings, risks, and open questions in a short notes file before discarding or planning. The findings inform the next sprint even if the prototype code is deleted.
